mapper.select: SELECT gs.spu_id AS spuId, gs.title AS title, gs.sub_title AS subTitle, gs.main_img AS mainImg, gs.price AS price, gs.status AS status, ugf.update_time AS followTime FROM user_goods_follow ugf INNER JOIN goods_spu gs ON ugf.spu_id = gs.spu_id WHERE ugf.user_id = #{userId} AND ugf.follow_status = 1 ORDER BY ugf.update_time DESC
